name: eslint-wrap: rule.detector_config must contain {eslint_rule, eslint_plugin_npm, eslint_plugin_version, eslint_options}
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf "source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-wrap-001, name: x, description: x, detector: wrap-eslint.sh, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}], detector_config: {eslint_rule: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps}}
recommended_set: [g-wrap-001]
all_set: [g-wrap-001]
" > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/wrap-eslint.sh" --rule-id g-wrap-001 --tree "$PWD/tree" --validate-config
